known_issues: Google posting feature not working as expected (Version 56)

existing_features.title: Resolve the 'Google Client ID not configured' error that prevents users from connecting their Google Account. The error message states 'Please set VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID environment variable.' Ensure the environment variable is properly configured and accessible to the frontend application.
Verify that the Google OAuth connection flow works end-to-end after the Client ID is configured, allowing users to successfully connect their Google/YouTube accounts and post clips.
